report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#410-414), newsletter v25 section, 2 Discord posts, and created 2 social card SVGs covering new Impermanent Loss and Hyperliquid guides, leveraging 60-day F&G extreme fear narrative and post-Drift security momentum.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #410 — Impermanent Loss: The Silent DeFi Killer (3-tweet educational thread, Mon May 12)
Tweet #411 — Hyperliquid: The Perp DEX Eating CEX Market Share (2-tweet spotlight, Tue May 13)
Tweet #412 — F&G 60-Day Extreme Fear: What History Says (2-tweet data analysis, Wed May 14)
Tweet #413 — DeFi Yield After the Drift Wake-Up Call (2-tweet educational, Thu May 15)
Tweet #414 — Weekly Roundup: New Guides + Market Context (2-tweet recap, Sat May 17)
Discord/Telegram: 2 posts — New Guides Launch (Mon May 12) + Post-Drift Security Checklist (Wed May 14)
Newsletter v25 section: 'The DeFi Security Reckoning' — 2 new guide features, 2 worth-reading picks, degen corner

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: Social card SVG: Impermanent Loss guide (1200x630, pool rebalancing visualization, IL stats)
Social card SVG: Hyperliquid Perp DEX guide (1200x630, on-chain order book visualization, TPS/finality stats)

sections.title: Key Narratives This Cycle
items: New content launch: IL deep-dive (973 lines) + Hyperliquid guide (1,004 lines)
Post-Drift security narrative: governance audit education, DeFi yield reassessment
F&G 60+ day extreme fear trough: historic parallel to COVID/Terra-Luna bottoms
Perp DEX migration: Hyperliquid gaining share as Drift users seek alternatives
Macro convergence: Liberation Day tariffs + stablecoin ATH + institutional accumulation vs retail fear
